title: SERIOUS PROTEIN – Protein Powder – 4kg – Low Carb – Supports Lean Muscle Growth – Recovery Supplement - The Bulk Protein Company - 133 Servings (Choc Peanut Butter)

features: ✅ 24g PROTEIN PER SERVING TO BUILD LEAN MUSCLE - A convenient way to help meet your daily protein needs. Use after training to quickly heal micro-tears in muscle tissues, speed up recovery and reduce muscle soreness for STRONGER and BIGGER muscles over time.

✅ HIGH PROTEIN, LOW CALORIES, LOW CARBS - Only 114 Calories Per Serving! Serious Protein powder is 80% Protein with Low Carbs, Sugars, and Fats. Ideal for adding LEAN MASS! Perfect to use as a meal replacement or part of a calorie-controlled diet, while trying to lean out, or for those simply looking to support MUSCLE GAINS.

✅ HIGH QUALITY INGREDIENTS - Premium blend of Whey Protein Concentrate, Micellar Casein and Soy Protein Isolate, a combination of slow and fast releasing proteins for total protein synthesis throughout the day. Also contains GLUTAMINE PEPTIDE, essential for muscle recovery and more bioavailable than regular glutamine, helping aid MUSCLE GROWTH.

✅ PROTEIN SHAKE THAT TASTES GREAT - Add 1 rounded scoop (30g) to 250ml of cold water or skimmed milk and shake well to create a great tasting Protein Shake! Can also be enjoyed in smoothies, with oats or when added to a pancake mix. For best results consume 1 serving (30g) one to three times per day
✅ EXCELLENT VALUE - More than 6 weeks supply in one tub, when following our recommended servings. Comes with scoop for measurements.
description: Product Description In short, Serious Protein is the perfect protein powder for those looking to support muscle gains, or if you're on a calorie-controlled diet and trying to lean out. It's designed to fit into every serious athlete's lifestyle by combining fast, slow, and medium speed digestion proteins into the same formula resulting in exceptional nutrient delivery and incredible results. Serious Protein is not about fancy packaging, high-carb flavours, or the rip-off pricing... it's about amazing value, huge protein levels, and incredible results in your training and diet. Ingredients Chocolate Peanut Butter flavour protein shake with sweetener Ingredients: SOY Protein Isolate, Glutamine Peptides (WHEAT), MILK Protein Concentrate, Maltodextrin, Cocoa Powder, Flavouring, Sweetener (Sucralose) | For Allergens, please see ingredients in Bold / CAPITALS. May also contain Egg, Nuts and Peanuts. Directions Directions: Mix 1 rounded scoop (30g) with 250ml of water and shake well before use. Once the shake is prepared consume the same day. Safety Warning Advisory: Intended for use by healthy adults, over the age of 18. Please store in a cool, dry place out of reach of children. Manufacturer Contact Information Distributed by: KBF Enterprises Unit 1, Guinness Rd Trading Est, Guinness Road, M17 1SB, UK See more
